team.name: it-operations
team.header: Team handling all IT related functions
team.purpose: Responsible for managing IT services, systems, and operations

team.name: device-distribution
team.header: Team for managing remote health monitoring devices distribution to patients
team.purpose: Ensuring efficient distribution and tracking of remote health monitoring devices

channel.name: service_desk
channel.header: Channel for handling IT service desk related discussions
channel.purpose: To manage IT service incident and request workflows

channel.name: distribution_logs
channel.header: Channel for discussing about the distribution logs of remote health monitoring devices
channel.purpose: To track and manage distribution of remote health monitoring devices

post.message: Hi Team, we have a scheduled system maintenance tomorrow from 1 PM to 3 PM. Please ensure all your work is saved before that time.
Thanks for the heads up, Emily. I'll make sure to inform my team.
Just a quick reminder - we have a team meeting scheduled for next Monday at 10 AM to discuss Q3 distribution strategies. Please prepare your updates.
I've received a couple of complaints about slow system performance. Jane, can you look into this?
Sure Emily, I'll check the server logs and report back.
Hi Emily, you asked earlier about the number of remote health monitoring devices distributed in June 2025. I've checked our records and we distributed 1,200 devices last month.
